layout: Mobile-first, single column with sticky 'Contact Agent' bar

components.image_captions: Italic, muted gray, placed below images

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white font-bold shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 hover:brightness-110 transition-all
buttons.outline: border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-600 bg-white dark:bg-gray-700 hover:bg-primary hover:text-white hover:border-primary transition-all font-bold
buttons.ghost: border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 transition-all

cards.iconCard: bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-700 hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all group
cards.propertyCard: bg-background-light dark:bg-gray-800/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-transparent hover:border-primary/20 transition-all shadow-sm group

tags.base: text-[10px] font-black uppercase px-2 py-1 rounded flex items-center gap-1

icons.cardIconWrapper: w-14 h-14 bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-900/30 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-primary mb-6 group-hover:bg-primary group-hover:text-white transition-colors
